ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster event */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster event */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each update record
Date when the update was made
Unique identifier for each donation record
